title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.910 - Role of law enforcement
text:
452.910.  Role of law enforcement. — At the request of a prosecutor or other appropriate public official acting under section 452.905, a law enforcement officer may take any lawful action reasonably necessary to locate a child or a party and assist such prosecutor or public official with responsibilities under section 452.905.
(L. 2009 H.B. 481)
